# Copilot instructions

Use the repository's `AGENTS.md` files as the source of truth for agent guidance:

- `/AGENTS.md`
- `/Taskington.Base/AGENTS.md` for core-engine work
- `/Taskington.Gui/AGENTS.md` for Avalonia frontend work
- `/Taskington.Gui.Extension/AGENTS.md` for shared GUI contracts

When multiple files apply, follow the most specific one for the files you touch.
